title: Review: secretx-wolfhsm SecretStore/WritableSecretStore
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — Code is well-structured with good invariant documentation. The port >32767 mis-classification and missing TOCTOU comment are the only real issues. No security surface, no data corruption paths.
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: no integration test against a real wolfHSM server; the NVM list/scan/find_free_id flow can only be fully validated live. Would raise confidence if: integration tests run against wolfHSM simulator.
